subcodes.first_line: The Lote-Tree beyond which there is no passing hath called out in the Kingdom of Creation: Verily, there is none other God but He, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تنادی السدره المنتهی فی ملکوت الانشاء انه لا اله الا هو العلیم الحکیم ما
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
